case_title: COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE, A CALIF. CORP. vs. ANDERSON, LYNETTE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLECTION BUREAU OF SAN JOSE, A CALIF. CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, LYNETTE
